About the Brand

A place to relax,
indulge & stay chill

Chill & Co was born from a love of exceptional food and unforgettable moments. Nestled in Ilidža, our café blends a warm, intimate atmosphere with a bold, creative menu that keeps you coming back.

From towering chocolate pancake stacks to gourmet burgers crafted with precision, every dish is designed to spark joy. We believe great food isn't just nourishment — it's an experience worth sharing.
